* Members should complete full-body MRI (Prenuvo-style) and comprehensive blood panels 6-8 weeks before the event

Name: What’s My Number — The Conversation No One Has at Parties
Event Description:
* Closed-door, member-only frank workshop on what ‘enough’ actually means — for money, success, time. 
* Each member privately writes their number — net worth needed, years of work left, success markers — before any group discussion
* Structured peer rounds in groups of four — share what you’re willing to share
* Ends with each member writing one decision they’ll make differently in the next 12 months
